CVE-2021-45907.title: An issue was discovered in gif2apng 1.9. There is a stack-based b ...
CVE-2021-45907.description: An issue was discovered in gif2apng 1.9. There is a stack-based buffer overflow involving a for loop. An attacker has little influence over the data written to the stack, making it unlikely that the flow of control can be subverted.

CVE-2021-45908.title: An issue was discovered in gif2apng 1.9. There is a stack-based b ...
CVE-2021-45908.description: An issue was discovered in gif2apng 1.9. There is a stack-based buffer overflow involving a while loop. An attacker has little influence over the data written to the stack, making it unlikely that the flow of control can be subverted.

CVE-2021-45909.title: An issue was discovered in gif2apng 1.9. There is a heap-based bu ...
CVE-2021-45909.description: An issue was discovered in gif2apng 1.9. There is a heap-based buffer overflow vulnerability in the DecodeLZW function. It allows an attacker to write a large amount of arbitrary data outside the boundaries of a buffer.

CVE-2021-45910.title: An issue was discovered in gif2apng 1.9. There is a heap-based bu ...
CVE-2021-45910.description: An issue was discovered in gif2apng 1.9. There is a heap-based buffer overflow within the main function. It allows an attacker to write data outside of the allocated buffer. The attacker has control over a part of the address that data is written to, control over the written data, and (to some extent) control over the amount of data that is written.

CVE-2021-45911.title: An issue was discovered in gif2apng 1.9. There is a heap-based bu ...
CVE-2021-45911.description: An issue was discovered in gif2apng 1.9. There is a heap-based buffer overflow in the main function. It allows an attacker to write 2 bytes outside the boundaries of the buffer.
